original_filename: Cheng et al. (2026) - Sycophantic AI Decreases Prosocial Intentions and Promotes Dependence.pdf

decisions.reason: Slug 2026 -> 2025 to match arXiv preprint date (Oct 2025) and existing 'Cheng et al. (2025)' citations in KB.
Relevance=HIGH, Quality=HIGH (multi-study: 11-LLM measurement + 2 preregistered behavioral RCTs N=1604). Distinguishes social sycophancy as new construct.
1 NEW concept (social-sycophancy) + 1 UPDATE (sycophancy: distinction, prevalence, behavioral evidence). All wikilinks resolve.
sources/cheng-sycophantic-prosocial-2025.md and concepts/social-sycophancy.md created; concepts/sycophancy.md updated with social/factual distinction, prevalence numbers, behavioral-causal evidence.
